infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app needs camera access to capture delivery photos
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app needs photo library access to select delivery photos
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app needs location access to track deliveries
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: This app needs background location access to track deliveries continuously
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: This app needs microphone access for voice notes

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow WorldClass ERP Driver to track your location for delivery updates.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Allow WorldClass ERP Driver to track your location in the background for delivery updates.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow WorldClass ERP Driver to track your location during deliveries.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow WorldClass ERP Driver to access camera for delivery photos.
